re_interview_log.scope: Add per-source security & quality alerts option to bundled github.com (and GHE) integration plugins

UI/UX polish (connection status surfacing, plugin grid + Settings full-width, bundled-disabled default, cut-list status exclusion + plugin-declared filter facets + chip colour discrimination), GitHub settings consolidation (move repo/project/submodule fields into github.com & GHE plugin Configure modal, rename tab to active-plugin name, collapse Configure/Choose-sources into single Connect/Configure button), plus systematic Playwright e2e coverage of the ENTIRE integration-plugins feature against a stubbed plugin process
